questionText: Is the neutral item 'Philosopher's Stone' limited to being equipped only during the night cycle?
explanation: Philosopher's Stone can be equipped at any time during the game, regardless of the day/night cycle.

questionText: Does the hero Chen have the ability to teleport allied heroes back to the fountain?
explanation: Chen's 'Divine Favor' ability can teleport allied heroes back to their base.

questionText: Is it possible for an Observer Ward to be placed inside the Roshan pit?
explanation: Observer Wards can be placed anywhere on the map, including inside the Roshan pit to grant vision.

questionText: Does the item 'Hand of Midas' provide a bonus experience multiplier when used on creeps?
explanation: Hand of Midas grants a specific amount of gold and a 1.6x experience multiplier for the creep killed.

questionText: Was the first International tournament held in Cologne, Germany?
explanation: The International 2011 took place at Gamescom in Cologne, Germany.

questionText: Does the hero Spectre receive increased damage when she is isolated from enemy units?
explanation: Spectre's 'Desolate' ability actually deals bonus damage to enemies who are isolated from their allies.

questionText: Can a player move items between their backpack and stash while their hero is dead?
explanation: Players retain full access to their inventory, backpack, and stash management even while their hero is respawning.

questionText: Does the 'Lotus Orb' reflect passive abilities triggered by enemy spells?
explanation: Lotus Orb only reflects targeted spells and does not interact with passive abilities or auras.

questionText: Did the team 'Wings Gaming' win The International 6?
explanation: Wings Gaming defeated Digital Chaos in the grand finals of TI6 to secure the championship.

questionText: Is the 'Tormentor' a neutral unit that grants a shard to a team member upon death?
explanation: Killing the Tormentor grants an Aghanim's Shard to the lowest net-worth hero on the team if they don't already have one.

questionText: Can Rubick steal the 'Spell Steal' ability from another Rubick?
explanation: Rubick's 'Spell Steal' cannot be stolen by another Rubick.

questionText: Does the 'Smoke of Deceit' break when a player is within range of an enemy tower?
explanation: Smoke of Deceit only breaks when a player is within 1025 range of an enemy hero or tower.

questionText: Is the 'Wraith King' capable of resurrecting himself without using a cooldown-based ability?
explanation: Wraith King's reincarnation ultimate is subject to a cooldown period.

questionText: Does the 'Moon Shard' item grant permanent attack speed if consumed?
explanation: Consuming a Moon Shard grants a permanent attack speed bonus and a small amount of bonus night vision.

questionText: Is the 'Aghanim's Blessing' an item that can be consumed to provide the scepter bonus without taking an inventory slot?
explanation: Aghanim's Blessing allows players to consume the Scepter for its bonuses, freeing up an inventory slot.

questionText: Can a hero with 'Black King Bar' be affected by any spells at all?
explanation: Some spells have the 'pierces spell immunity' property and can affect heroes even when they have BKB active.

questionText: Does the hero Meepo create permanent clones of himself that share the same items?
explanation: Meepo's clones share his boots but cannot hold their own independent items, and they are not permanent if killed.

questionText: Is there a limit to how many times a player can buy back in a single game?
explanation: There is no hard limit on the number of buybacks, but the cooldown and gold cost increase significantly with each use.

questionText: Did Team Liquid win The International 7?
explanation: Team Liquid, led by KuroKy, won TI7 by defeating Newbee in the grand finals.

questionText: Does the hero 'Underlord' possess an ability to teleport his entire team to a target location?
explanation: Underlord's ultimate, 'Fiend's Gate', creates portals that allow allies to teleport across the map.

questionText: Does the 'Phase Boots' item increase movement speed and allow the hero to pass through other units?
explanation: The active ability of Phase Boots grants bonus movement speed and unit walking for a short duration.

questionText: Is the 'Manta Style' item only available to Agility heroes?
explanation: Manta Style can be purchased by any hero in the game, regardless of their primary attribute.

questionText: Are Roshan's health and damage values static throughout the entire game?
explanation: Roshan's stats increase progressively as the game time passes.

questionText: Does the 'Linken's Sphere' block all spells that target the user?
explanation: Linken's Sphere blocks most single-target spells, but it does not block spells that are specifically labeled as 'unblockable'.

questionText: Is the player 'Miracle-' known for his performance on the mid-lane role?
explanation: Miracle- is widely recognized as one of the most iconic mid-laners in Dota 2 history.

questionText: Can a creep wave be completely skipped by a hero?
explanation: Players can 'cut' the wave by pulling enemy creeps behind the enemy tower, effectively skipping them or dragging them into the jungle.

questionText: Does the 'Observer Ward' provide gold bounty if destroyed by an enemy?
explanation: Destroying an enemy Observer Ward rewards the player with a gold bounty.

questionText: Is the 'Aegis of the Immortal' automatically consumed upon the hero's death?
explanation: When a hero carrying the Aegis dies, it is consumed to resurrect them at the location of their death.

questionText: Can heroes use items while they are under the effect of a silence?
explanation: Silence prevents the use of spells, but it generally does not prevent the use of items unless specified otherwise.

questionText: Does the 'Scythe of Vyse' turn an enemy into a pig/sheep?
explanation: The active effect of Scythe of Vyse, known as Hex, transforms the target into a harmless creature.

questionText: Does every hero have an innate ability that is active from level 1?
explanation: As of recent patches, every hero possesses an innate ability that is granted at level 1.

questionText: Is 'N0tail' the most successful player in terms of TI tournament winnings?
explanation: Johan 'N0tail' Sundstein has won The International twice and holds one of the highest total prize money earnings.

questionText: Are there neutral items that can be shared between teammates?
explanation: Neutral items can be placed in the neutral stash or dropped on the ground to be picked up by teammates.

questionText: Does the hero 'Techies' have the ability to place mines that deal damage?
explanation: Techies is famous for his various mine-based abilities that deal damage to enemies.

questionText: Can a player destroy their own items to prevent enemies from picking them up?
explanation: Players can choose to destroy items in their inventory, which removes them from the game permanently.

questionText: Does the 'Town Portal Scroll' have a shared cooldown with the 'Boots of Travel'?
explanation: Boots of Travel have an independent cooldown from the Town Portal Scroll.

questionText: Is 'Axe' capable of forcing enemies to attack him?
explanation: Axe's 'Berserker's Call' ability forces nearby enemies to attack him for a short duration.

questionText: Does the 'Blink Dagger' go on cooldown if you take damage from an enemy hero?
explanation: Taking damage from enemy heroes puts the Blink Dagger on a 3-second cooldown.

questionText: Is the 'Aghanim's Shard' a cheaper version of the Scepter that grants a different ability upgrade?
explanation: Aghanim's Shard provides a specific, often unique, upgrade to a hero's existing abilities.

questionText: Can you stack more than one neutral camp at the same time using a single hero?
explanation: A skilled player can time their movement to pull multiple camps simultaneously, stacking them both.

questionText: Is 'Pudge' the hero with the most appearances in professional Dota 2 matches?
explanation: Pudge is consistently one of the most picked heroes in both public and professional Dota 2 matches.

questionText: Does the 'Gem of True Sight' provide invisibility to the holder?
explanation: The Gem of True Sight grants detection of invisible units but does not grant invisibility itself.

questionText: Are there different colored runes that offer unique bonuses?
explanation: Power runes (like Haste, Double Damage, Regeneration) appear at specific locations and provide various buffs.

questionText: Did OG win The International 8 and 9 consecutively?
explanation: OG is the first team to win two consecutive Internationals, in 2018 and 2019.

questionText: Does the 'Refresher Orb' reset the cooldown of the 'Black King Bar'?
explanation: Refresher Orb resets the cooldown of almost all items, including the Black King Bar.

questionText: Can you use an ability while you are in the middle of a teleportation channel?
explanation: Most abilities will interrupt the teleportation channel if cast during the channeling process.

questionText: Is 'Puppey' the only player to have attended every International tournament up to 2024?
explanation: Clement 'Puppey' Ivanov has qualified for every iteration of The International since its inception.

questionText: Does the 'Aegis of the Immortal' grant bonus stats?
explanation: The Aegis only provides the reincarnation effect and does not grant any attribute or damage bonuses.

questionText: Is the 'Courier' a hero that can attack enemies?
explanation: The courier is a non-combat unit designed solely for transporting items; it cannot attack.

questionText: Does the 'Bounty Rune' grant gold to all teammates?
explanation: Picking up a Bounty Rune provides gold to every member of the team.

questionText: Is 'Invoker' known for his ability to invoke different combinations of elements?
explanation: Invoker uses Exort, Quas, and Wex to combine into various powerful spells.

questionText: Does the 'Monkey King Bar' guarantee that your attacks cannot miss?
explanation: Monkey King Bar provides a pierce effect that makes attacks ignore evasion.

questionText: Are there different tiers of Neutral Items that unlock as the game progresses?
explanation: Neutral items drop in tiers based on the game clock (e.g., Tier 1 early, Tier 5 late).

questionText: Can 'Earthshaker' use his ultimate to damage structures?
explanation: Echo Slam does not deal damage to buildings or structures.

questionText: Is 'Phantom Assassin' considered a hard carry hero?
explanation: Phantom Assassin is a classic hard carry who relies on gold and items to become powerful in the late game.

questionText: Does the 'Dagon' deal pure damage?
explanation: Dagon deals magical damage, which can be mitigated by magic resistance.

questionText: Is 'Team Secret' a team that has historically been captained by Puppey?
explanation: Puppey founded and has long captained Team Secret.

questionText: Can you deny your own hero if you are under the effect of a damage-over-time spell?
explanation: You can only deny yourself if you are affected by specific self-damage abilities (like Doom or Shadow Demon's Soul Catcher), not generic damage-over-time.

questionText: Does 'Tiny' gain bonus damage to buildings as he levels his ultimate?
explanation: Tiny's ultimate, 'Grow', provides significant bonus damage against structures.

questionText: Is the 'Captain's Mode' the primary game mode for professional tournaments?
explanation: Captain's Mode is the standard format used in professional Dota 2 for its balanced drafting phase.

questionText: Are there heroes that can turn invisible without items or abilities?
explanation: Every form of invisibility in Dota 2 requires either an item (like Shadow Blade) or a hero ability (like Riki's Cloak and Dagger).

questionText: Does the 'Aegis of the Immortal' disappear if it is not used within a certain timeframe?
explanation: The Aegis expires after 5 minutes if it is not used.

questionText: Is 'Intelligence' the primary attribute of 'Anti-Mage'?
explanation: Anti-Mage is an Agility-based hero.

questionText: Can a player be reported for 'feeding' in a ranked match?
explanation: Intentional feeding is a reportable offense in the Dota 2 conduct system.

questionText: Does the 'Shiva's Guard' item provide an active ability that slows enemies?
explanation: Shiva's Guard has an active ability that releases a wave of cold, dealing damage and slowing enemies.

questionText: Is the map of Dota 2 completely identical on both sides (Radiant and Dire)?
explanation: The Radiant and Dire sides are asymmetrical in layout, terrain, and jungle camp placement.

questionText: Does 'Morphling' have the ability to morph his agility into strength?
explanation: Morphling's primary ability allows him to trade agility for strength and vice-versa.

questionText: Is the 'Pos 3' role commonly referred to as the Offlaner?
explanation: The Pos 3 player is traditionally assigned to the offlane, focusing on survivability and utility.

questionText: Can you buyback if your hero has not yet respawned?
explanation: Buyback is specifically an action taken while dead to respawn immediately.

questionText: Does the 'Divine Rapier' get removed from the game if the hero holding it dies?
explanation: The Divine Rapier drops on the ground upon death and can be picked up by any hero.

questionText: Is 'Dendi' a professional player known for his time at Natus Vincere?
explanation: Danil 'Dendi' Ishutin is one of the most famous Dota 2 players, known for his legendary mid-lane play at Na'Vi.

questionText: Does 'Monkey King' have an ability that allows him to jump into trees?
explanation: Monkey King's 'Tree Dance' ability allows him to leap onto and move between trees.

questionText: Can you stack neutral camps by using spells to kill the creeps just before the minute mark?
explanation: Stacking requires pulling the creeps out of their spawn box before the new minute, not killing them.

questionText: Does the 'Ancient' have a health regeneration ability?
explanation: The Ancient regenerates health when no enemy creeps are attacking it.

questionText: Is the 'Aegis' transferable between teammates?
explanation: The Aegis cannot be dropped, sold, or shared; it stays in the inventory of the hero who picked it up.

questionText: Does 'Shadow Blade' provide invisibility upon activation?
explanation: Shadow Blade grants invisibility and a movement speed bonus when activated.

questionText: Does 'Sniper's' ultimate have a global cast range?
explanation: Sniper's 'Assassinate' has a very long range, but it is not global.

questionText: Does 'Manta Style' create two illusions?
explanation: Manta Style creates two illusions of the hero that last for a set duration.

questionText: Is 'Storm Spirit' an Intelligence hero?
explanation: Storm Spirit is a classic Intelligence-based caster.

questionText: Is 'Faceless Void's' 'Chronosphere' able to trap allies?
explanation: Chronosphere stops all units, including allies, except for the Faceless Void himself.

questionText: Is the 'Ancient Apparition's' 'Ice Blast' a global ability?
explanation: Ice Blast can be fired from anywhere on the map to any location.

questionText: Does 'Orchid Malevolence' silence enemies?
explanation: Orchid Malevolence silences the target and deals bonus damage when the silence ends.

questionText: Can you teleport to friendly units using a Town Portal Scroll?
explanation: Town Portal Scrolls allow teleportation to friendly structures and units.

questionText: Does 'Huskar' gain attack speed as his health decreases?
explanation: Huskar's passive, 'Berserker's Blood', grants attack speed and magic resistance based on missing health.

questionText: Is 'Queen of Pain' a Strength hero?
explanation: Queen of Pain is an Intelligence hero.

questionText: Can 'Bounty Hunter' track invisible enemies?
explanation: Bounty Hunter's 'Track' ability reveals the target, including if they turn invisible.

questionText: Does 'Bloodseeker' get stronger when nearby enemies are low on health?
explanation: Bloodseeker's 'Thirst' ability grants movement speed and attack damage when nearby enemies are low on health.

questionText: Does 'Lotus Orb' reflect all spells?
explanation: Lotus Orb only reflects single-target spells; it does not reflect ground-targeted or passive spells.

questionText: Can 'Brewmaster's' Primal Split units be killed individually?
explanation: The three spirits created by Primal Split are separate units that can be targeted and killed.
